title: Result - France
content:
Welcome to France, a world-renowned destination celebrated for its rich cultural heritage and stunningly diverse landscapes. With 35 UNESCO World Heritage Sites, it offers remarkable historical and natural treasures.
Famous for its exceptional cuisine, recognized as UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage, France captivates food lovers everywhere. As the world’s fifth-largest economy, France is a leader in fields such as fashion, agriculture, technology and craftsmanship, reflecting its creativity and innovation.

## Unique food tradition
Cuisses de grenouille (frog's legs): a local delicacy with a chicken or fish flavour, are cooked by stewing, frying, grilling, or stir-frying.
Around 11.5% of the workforce is self-employed, reflecting the entrepreneurial segment of the labour market.

### Local legend or myth
La Bête du Gevaudan: a wolf-like monster that prowled the Auvergne and South Dordogne areas of France during the years 1764 to 1767.

### Language of the Land
French is the sixth most spoken language globally, with over 300 million speakers and official status in numerous countries and international organizations.
